message:
feat: auto-repair event logging + dist-to-src fallback (bd-k5q5.8.1, bd-k5q5.8.2)

Add structured auto-repair infrastructure for the extension runtime:
- RepairPattern enum (5 variants) and ExtensionRepairEvent struct
- auto_repair_enabled config flag on PiJsRuntimeConfig
- record_repair()/drain_repair_events()/repair_count() on PiJsRuntime
- repairs_total field in PiJsTickStats
- DrainRepairEvents command on JsExtensionRuntimeHandle
- Pattern 1: dist/ → src/ fallback in module resolution
- 18 unit/integration tests in tests/extensions_repair_events.rs

Also includes concurrent agent changes to tools.rs, shim tests, and perf reports.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
